vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_01.mp3.transcript: My sentries could've handled that one on their own!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_02.mp3.transcript: We done already? Now that is a shame.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_03.mp3.transcript: Shucks! I was just gettin' started.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_05.mp3.transcript: Nice seein' the back of that one!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_06.mp3.transcript: I got hats harder than that!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_07.mp3.transcript: We got that done faster than a knife-fight in a phone booth!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_09.mp3.transcript: We won! Can't say I'm surprised, though.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_10.mp3.transcript: We kicked a metric ton of ass, boys!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_11.mp3.transcript: Hah, now that is some tactical problem-solving!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_12.mp3.transcript: They call me mule, boy! 'Cause all I do is carry!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_13.mp3.transcript: My 11th PhD is in Applied Ass-Kicking!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_14.mp3.transcript: We did it! With a little help from Mother Science.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_rare_01.mp3.transcript: We only got two speeds: fast and faster!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_rare_02.mp3.transcript: Winnin' ain't everything! Heh heh, 'course it's a sight better than losin'!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_rare_03.mp3.transcript: Go Bee Cave IC Tech! Go Fightin' Cows!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_gamewon_rare_04.mp3.transcript: You cross the boss, you take the loss, hoss!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_matchwon_10.mp3.transcript: You bet your ass, we won!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_02.mp3.transcript: This wrench ain't gonna swing itself!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_07.mp3.transcript: Reckon we better get to gettin'!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_11.mp3.transcript: We best get on the stick!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_15.mp3.transcript: Come on, boys! These Yankees are all hat and no battle!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_6s_01..transcript: I may be new to 6s, but this ain't my first rodeo! Let's win this!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_6s_02..transcript: I reckon I brought enough boot to kick six asses!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_6s_03..transcript: Six Yankees against one of my sentries? I believe the numbers are in my favor here!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_comp_0.transcript: I don't know about y'all, but I'm feelin' pretty damn competitive!
I don't know about y'all, but I'm feelin' mighty competitive!
Let's kick some ass and take some games!
Good news, boys! I drafted up a blueprint of the other team's asses and it looks like all our boots are gonna fit up there!
Fellas, I've seen their scrim. Them boys are a bunch of broken down old mules!
Wait, they let you bring Sentries to this game? (laughs) Well, game on, then!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamefirst_rare_0.transcript: Winning's like science, boys: if you wanna steak, you gotta prove it!
Don't worry, boys! The Engineer, is Engi-here! (laughs) Yeah... Still tinkerin' with that one.
Man vs. Sentry? I believe I'll take 900 pounds of precision-machined steel over a little fella that runs fast!
I love engines! Pinion shafts. Flanges. Mitigating shock loads. But most of all: I love winnin'!
Hoo wee! They ain't gonna know what hit 'em! Though it'll likely to be bullets. Statistically speaking.
This button here, builds Teleporters. This button, builds Dispensers. And this little button makes them enemy sum-bitches wish they'd never been born!
I whipped up a satellite earlier to scan the topography of the area, boys. And guess what? There's plenty of room for us to kick their asses all over it!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamelostlast_01..transcript: We're down, boys. Let's beat these hat-less sons-of-bitches!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamelostlast_05..transcript: Do I look like a mule, boys? I can't carry this whole dang team!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamelostlast_06..transcript: Them boys've gone and made me lose my temper.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamelostlast_08..transcript: I've have just about enough of losin'! Who's with me?

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamelostlast_09..transcript: We're gonna stop these mother-hubbards in their tracks!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregametie_02.mp3.transcript: We gotta break this tie, boys!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregametie_04.mp3.transcript: I won't stand for no ties, boys!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregametie_05.mp3.transcript: I never much cared for ties. Let's break this one!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregametie_06.mp3.transcript: This tie just gripes my gizzard! We're breakin' it now!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamewonlast_02.m.transcript: There's more where that came from!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamewonlast_03.m.transcript: Those sorry sum-bitches gave me an idea for a new invention: bullet-magnets!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamewonlast_04.m.transcript: I ran the numbers, boys! We got this one in the bag!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamewonlast_comp.transcript: How's about we teleport some talent over to the other team?
Looks like the other team could use a skill-Dispenser.
I wouldn't call that last game 'competitive', if y'all know what I mean.
Now a few years back, I invented the bullet-magnet. Do you think the other team stole my schematics?

vo/compmode/cm_engie_pregamewonlast_rare.transcript: These fellas are gonna be ohm-less if they don't put up more of a resistance!" (laughs) "Ah, that's an engineering joke.

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_03.mp3.transcript: Anything better than a rank up? Nope!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_05.mp3.transcript: I love beer, barbecue, and rankin' up!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_09.mp3.transcript: I reckon we just got promoted!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_10.mp3.transcript: Looks like we just got ourselves a promotion!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_12.mp3.transcript: Looks like we're movin' up in the world!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_13.mp3.transcript: That was a heap of work!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_14.mp3.transcript: Looks like our hard work is finally payin' off!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_rankup_highest_01.m.transcript: I was gonna invent the Death-Dispenser. But it looks like y'all beat me to it. Nice work!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_summary_callout_01..transcript: Now that is a cool breeze on a hot day!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_summary_callout_02..transcript: I am damn proud right now!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_summary_callout_03..transcript: I believe I will buy you a beer!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_summary_callout_04..transcript: Son, I never said this to anybody before, but I am damn proud of you!

vo/compmode/cm_engie_summary_callout_06..transcript: You wrangled that up just right!

vo/engineer_autoonfire01.mp3.transcript: Fire, Fire! Ow oh oh oh-grr fire!

vo/engineer_cheers05.mp3.transcript: Now that there was a fine piece of work.

vo/engineer_cloakedspy03.mp3.transcript: There's a Spy creepin' around here!

vo/engineer_cloakedspyidentify10.mp3.transcript: That Spy ain't on our side!

vo/engineer_dominationdemoman01.mp3.transcript: I wish y'all could see how bad I'm kickin' your tail.

vo/engineer_dominationdemoman02.mp3.transcript: Drunk on the battlefield ain't no way to be, son.

vo/engineer_dominationdemoman05.mp3.transcript: The hand is quicker than the eye!

vo/engineer_dominationengineer01.mp3.transcript: You just ain't doin' it right.

vo/engineer_dominationengineer03.mp3.transcript: A real Texan woulda dodged that.

vo/engineer_dominationengineer04.mp3.transcript: You can always tell a Texan, but you can't tell 'em much.

vo/engineer_dominationengineer05.mp3.transcript: You done incurred my wrath, son!

vo/engineer_dominationengineer06.mp3.transcript: I'm wolverine-mean, you son of a bitch.

vo/engineer_dominationengineer07.mp3.transcript: If ya done it, it ain't braggin'!

vo/engineer_dominationengineer08.mp3.transcript: You're all hardhat and no cattle.

vo/engineer_dominationengineer09.mp3.transcript: You shoulda oughta brought more gun, son.

vo/engineer_dominationheavy01.mp3.transcript: Never mind the bullets. How much all these coffins costin' ya?

vo/engineer_dominationheavy02.mp3.transcript: I've seen better sides of beef been run over by a combine.

vo/engineer_dominationheavy11.mp3.transcript: You're dumb as a box of rocks!

vo/engineer_dominationheavy12.mp3.transcript: Y'all come back now! More where that came from.

vo/engineer_dominationheavy14.mp3.transcript: You are a whole herd'a ugly.

vo/engineer_dominationmedic01.mp3.transcript: Doctor! I am the better man!

vo/engineer_dominationmedic02.mp3.transcript: Guess they didn't teach you to duck in doctor school!

vo/engineer_dominationmedic03.mp3.transcript: Keep comin' at me, doctor; eventually y'all gonna rustle up some sense.

vo/engineer_dominationmedic04.mp3.transcript: Next time, tend to your own knittin', sawbones.

vo/engineer_dominationmedic05.mp3.transcript: Sell your tonics elsewhere, miracle man.

vo/engineer_dominationmedic06.mp3.transcript: You must be a doctor, 'cause you just saw the extent of my patience!

vo/engineer_dominationmedic07.mp3.transcript: I'm a killer of men, doc. That is the God's honest truth.

vo/engineer_dominationmedic08.mp3.transcript: "Slap a poultice on that, doc!" (laughs sarcastically)

vo/engineer_dominationpyro05.mp3.transcript: Sorry to put out your campfire, boy.

vo/engineer_dominationpyro06.mp3.transcript: You look a mite tongue-tied, son.

vo/engineer_dominationpyro07.mp3.transcript: You shouldn't have played with fire, boy.

vo/engineer_dominationpyro08.mp3.transcript: Didn't yer momma teach ya not to play with matches?

vo/engineer_dominationpyro09.mp3.transcript: Y'all might be flame retardant, but ya sure ain't bulletproof.

vo/engineer_dominationscout01.mp3.transcript: Y'all gotta run a lot faster than that.

vo/engineer_dominationscout02.mp3.transcript: Ya ain't too fast for me and my machines now, are ya? Heh. Are ya?

vo/engineer_dominationscout03.mp3.transcript: Boy, this here is just gonna keep happenin' and happenin'.

vo/engineer_dominationscout05.mp3.transcript: Y'all just got dominated, city boy.

vo/engineer_dominationscout06.mp3.transcript: What in Sam Hill were you thinkin', string-bean?

vo/engineer_dominationscout07.mp3.transcript: Shoot, son, y'all slow as molasses.

vo/engineer_dominationscout10.mp3.transcript: Quick as a hiccup, ain'tcha? Huh. [whispering] Not quick enough.

vo/engineer_dominationscout11.mp3.transcript: Not fast enough; not by a damn sight.

vo/engineer_dominationsniper01.mp3.transcript: Ya oughta stand back a little more, like from me and my machines.

vo/engineer_dominationsniper02.mp3.transcript: Looks like that there just weren't the place you oughta be standin'!

vo/engineer_dominationsniper04.mp3.transcript: You shoulda oughta stayed back at your little campsite.

vo/engineer_dominationsniper06.mp3.transcript: I just rode you out on a rail, down under.

vo/engineer_dominationsniper07.mp3.transcript: Aw, now ya don't look like a happy camper.

vo/engineer_dominationsniper08.mp3.transcript: Down under? More like, six feet down under.

vo/engineer_dominationsoldier02.mp3.transcript: That there is just a sad display, boy.

vo/engineer_dominationsoldier05.mp3.transcript: Y'all just got drafted into my war!

vo/engineer_dominationsoldier06.mp3.transcript: That's what it feels like when eagles cry, soldier-boy.

vo/engineer_dominationsoldier07.mp3.transcript: Next time, lift your lid and you might see it comin'!

vo/engineer_dominationsoldier08.mp3.transcript: This all's what happens when you fight a man.

vo/engineer_dominationspy01.mp3.transcript: Now just stop tryin' ta mess with my contraptions.

vo/engineer_dominationspy02.mp3.transcript: It ain't gettin' any harder for me to kill ya.

vo/engineer_dominationspy03.mp3.transcript: You know where ya oughta hide next time? Back in France.

vo/engineer_dominationspy07.mp3.transcript: Slither on back to hell, coward!

vo/engineer_dominationspy08.mp3.transcript: That's what my daddy taught me to do to backstabbers.

vo/engineer_dominationspy09.mp3.transcript: You're a looooooong way from France, boy.

vo/engineer_dominationspy10.mp3.transcript: Don't go meddlin' in my business.

vo/engineer_dominationspy11.mp3.transcript: You are a coward and a scoundrel!

vo/engineer_dominationspy12.mp3.transcript: If y'all had more gadgets for killin', you wouldn't need so many for hidin'.

vo/engineer_dominationspy13.mp3.transcript: I just beat on your sneaky ass like a mule, boy!

vo/engineer_goldenwrenchkill01.mp3.transcript: That there is a gold-plated kill!

vo/engineer_goldenwrenchkill02.mp3.transcript: Guess I got the Midas touch.

vo/engineer_goldenwrenchkill03.mp3.transcript: At least you ain't worthless anymore.

vo/engineer_goldenwrenchkill04.mp3.transcript: Erectin' a statue of a moron.

vo/engineer_helpmecapture02.mp3.transcript: This point ain't gonna cap itself! Get over here!

vo/engineer_helpmedefend02.mp3.transcript: I need help defending this point!

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_domination01.mp.transcript: Dominated. By a unicorn. You are pathetic, son.

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_domination02.mp.transcript: You just got dominated, pink pony style.

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_domination03.mp.transcript: Dominated! By a man in a pink wig! That is some shame right there.

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_healed01.mp3.transcript: I feel like a brand new unicorn, doc!

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_revenge02.mp3.transcript: You ladies shoulda oughta brought some unicorns with ya.

vo/engineer_item_unicorn_uber01.mp3.transcript: I am a pink pony god!

vo/engineer_littlesentry01.mp3.transcript: Sometimes, you just need a little less gun.

vo/engineer_littlesentry02.mp3.transcript: Ain't that a cute little gun?

vo/engineer_mvm_bomb_upgrade02.mp3.transcript: That bomb bot's gettin' meaner, boys!

vo/engineer_mvm_collect_credits03.mp3.transcript: Whoo, look at all that money.

vo/engineer_mvm_encourage_upgrade01.mp3.transcript: Come on, boys, let's get to them Upgrade Stations.

vo/engineer_mvm_get_upgrade02.mp3.transcript: Whoo! I feel fit as a fiddle.

vo/engineer_mvm_giant_robot03.mp3.transcript: Big robot's got the bomb, boys!

vo/engineer_mvm_loot_common01.mp3.transcript: Not bad. Not bad at all.

vo/engineer_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk01.mp.transcript: The robots are taking the gate!

vo/engineer_mvm_mannhattan_gate_take01.m.transcript: Aw, hell! The robots took the gate!

vo/engineer_mvm_resurrect02.mp3.transcript: I ain't got time to die!

vo/engineer_mvm_resurrect03.mp3.transcript: Being dead just got me mad!

vo/engineer_mvm_stand_alone01.mp3.transcript: Guess it's up to me now.

vo/engineer_mvm_taunt01.mp3.transcript: I will send every damn one of you back to robot hell!

vo/engineer_mvm_taunt02.mp3.transcript: When y'all meet your maker, tell him to build you some guts next time.

vo/engineer_mvm_wave_end03.mp3.transcript: Robot ain't been built can't get shot.

vo/engineer_mvm_wave_end04.mp3.transcript: Damn robots went and got me mad.

vo/engineer_mvm_wave_end06.mp3.transcript: Hell, boys, we better man up in a big damn hurry.

vo/engineer_mvm_wave_start01.mp3.transcript: Grab some steel, boys, they're comin'!

vo/engineer_needdispenser01.mp3.transcript: We need a Dispenser riiight here.

vo/engineer_needsentry01.mp3.transcript: We need a Sentry riiight here.

vo/engineer_needteleporter01.mp3.transcript: We need a Teleporter riiight here.

vo/engineer_needteleporter02.mp3.transcript: Somebody wanna rustle up a Teleporter right here?

vo/engineer_revenge01.mp3.transcript: That'll cut'cha back down to size.

vo/engineer_revenge02.mp3.transcript: You were gettin' too big for your britches!

vo/engineer_sentrymoving02.mp3.transcript: Outta mah way! Outta mah way!

vo/engineer_sentryplanting02.mp3.transcript: That there wasn't gettin' any lighter.

vo/engineer_sf13_magic_reac02.mp3.transcript: What dumb son of a bitch cast that?

vo/engineer_sf13_midnight01.mp3.transcript: The bridge is down, boys! Get while the gettin's good!

vo/engineer_sf13_midnight03.mp3.transcript: The bridge is down! Go, go, go!

vo/engineer_sf13_round_start01.mp3.transcript: Let's get that dead man movin'!

vo/engineer_sf13_round_start02.mp3.transcript: Let's get this buzzard bait in a hole, boys!

vo/engineer_sf13_round_start03.mp3.transcript: Push that damn old man straight to damn hell!

vo/engineer_sf13_round_start04.mp3.transcript: Let's get this damn old man to hell!

vo/engineer_specialcompleted01.mp3.transcript: Whoooowee, would ya look at that!

vo/engineer_specialcompleted07.mp3.transcript: Take it like a man, shorty.

vo/engineer_specialcompleted08.mp3.transcript: That's what it was made for.

vo/engineer_specialcompleted09.mp3.transcript: I told ya don't touch that darn thing.

vo/engineer_specialcompleted10.mp3.transcript: How'd that plan turn out for ya, dummy?

vo/engineer_standonthepoint01.mp3.transcript: Plant yerself on that darn point, mister!

vo/engineer_standonthepoint02.mp3.transcript: Plant yerself on the point, mister!

vo/engineer_wranglekills01.mp3.transcript: This thing ain't on auto-pilot, son!

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts01.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna beat you like a rented mule, boy.

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts02.mp3.transcript: You ladies shoulda' oughta' brought some menfolk with ya.

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts03.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna tear you down, junior!

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts04.mp3.transcript: I'm done playin' games with you, boy.

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts05.mp3.transcript: You're all about to have a real bad day!

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts11.mp3.transcript: Why don't you all get along before one of you gets hurt?

vo/taunts/engineer_taunts12.mp3.transcript: Son! I'm gonna blow that dumb look right off your stupid face!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_02.mp3.transcript: Hmm hmm hmm! Hmm hmm hmm! (panting)

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_03.mp3.transcript: Hoo! Hoo! Hoo! Hoo! Yeah! Hooyah! Go doggie! Hmm!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_103.mp3.transcript: Le's see a sentry track this!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_111.mp3.transcript: All right, time to take it to Level 3!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_123.mp3.transcript: Okay body, time to Teleport you to a world of physical fitness! Phew!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_129.mp3.transcript: Haha! I don't even need my good hand for this!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_32.mp3.transcript: Hmm hehehehe! Hmm ha ha ha ! Light as a feather!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_43.mp3.transcript: Heh heh! Feel the burn now!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_45.mp3.transcript: Haha! Ya'll ain't ready for this!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_92.mp3.transcript: Yes, sir! I'm all fired up!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_aerobic_98.mp3.transcript: I'm running hotter than Hell's basement!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_bronco_02.mp3.transcript: Woo hoo! Hoo hoo! Yeah! Yee-haw!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_bronco_12.mp3.transcript: Mmh! Huh ha hoo! This is not doing my spine any favors!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_bronco_16.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! Come on, spinal column, don't let me down now!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_taunt_cong_fun_20.mp3.transcript: Oom bah, oom bah, omm bah, oom bah! Yeah ye-yeah!

vo/taunts/engy/eng_taunt_cong_fun_35.mp3.transcript: Oh hee, hee, hee, hee, hee!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_08.transcript: That contract was all hat and no cattle!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_09.transcript: My sentries could have handled that one on their own!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_11.transcript: We got that done faster than a knife fight in a phonebooth!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_13.transcript: Shucks, I was just getting started!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_14.transcript: We done already? Now that is a shame!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_easy_15.transcript: I got hats harder than that!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_hard_04.transcript: Nice seeing the back of that one!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_hard_05.transcript: That was a heap of work!

vo/toughbreak/eng_quest_complete_hard_10.transcript: We only got two speeds: fast and faster!
